message:
Fix Fibonacci hashing to use bit shift instead of mask

Replace mask-based modulo (h & mask) with proper Fibonacci hashing
via right-shift (h >> shift). The mask approach was only correct when
capacity is a power of two AND the hash happens to distribute well in
the low bits, but Fibonacci hashing produces its best distribution in
the high bits. Using shift = 32 - log2(capacity) extracts those high
bits correctly.

Update the linear probing collision test to dynamically find two pages
that hash to the same bucket rather than relying on a hardcoded
assumption about which pages collide.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
